title: stylidium affine
intro: Stylidium affine, also known as the Triggerplant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Stylidiaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, making it useful for treating wounds and reducing swelling. The health benefits of Stylidium affine include its ability to soothe digestive issues and act as an antimicrobial agent, preventing the growth of bacteria and other microorganisms. Stylidium affine can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, or infusions for internal use, or applied topically as a salve or cream for external treatment.
